task: Using only the embedded packet, evaluate four tokamak shots and determine whether the gas-jet / shattered-pellet mitigation trigger timing and injected mass meet the stated rules. Compute trigger_margin = thermal_quench_ms - trigger_ms_after_warning for each shot. Apply rules: trigger_margin >= 4 ms; injected_mass_mg >= 75 * current_MA; if runaway_signal == high then require trigger_margin >= 6 ms. Test the three proposed mitigations (lower_warning_threshold, precharge_valve, lockout_high_current) against timing, mass, false-positive tolerance, and cost constraints. Classify each shot (pass/warn/fail/needs_review), evaluate each mitigation (fixes/introduces issues) and recommend release / retest / hold. Produce disruption_timing_review.xlsx and operations_gate_memo.md containing executable formulas or logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around controlling thresholds, and a final decision table. Do not import external data or invent missing values; flag unresolved assumptions for expert review.
